heroHeadline: Day 38: Iran Threatens to Close Bab al-Mandeb — Dual Chokepoint Threat Targets Global Trade
heroSubtitle: Iran escalates maritime coercion by threatening to close the Bab al-Mandeb alongside Hormuz, potentially disrupting 10–15% of global seaborne trade via the Red Sea–Suez Canal corridor.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-06. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
